examples: After two phone calls, she got to the kitchen to prepare a Tet feast.
DURING Tet, the lunar new year holiday, money is everywhere in Vietnam.
In Vietnam, consumers are rethinking what to buy for the holiday known locally as Tet.
Now, Golson has just released a new album called New Time, New 'Tet.
"Carbon tet", as it is known, is a highly toxic pollutant which is known to cause cancer and liver damage.
